title: LearnMD Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for the YAML frontmatter of a .learn.md file (Level 1).

title.description: Lesson title. Inferred from the first # H1 heading if omitted.

lang.description: BCP 47 language tag (e.g. en, fr, es). Mandatory.

tags.description: Free-form tags for discovery and filtering.

author.description: Author name or identifier. Displayed in the player if present.
